Bayesian Brier (calibrated)

Headline finding

Under a distance-based baseline, urine cytokines and an 18-feature cardiovascular panel are the only credibly above-chance non-invasive surrogates. A classifier-sensitivity pass shows this ranking is estimator-dependent: a random forest lifts both microbiome modalities from chance to 0.56–0.65 and the serum panel to 0.804. The honest conclusion is not "microbiome has no signal" but "a distance classifier is the wrong tool at p≫n".

Post-minus-pre mean shift in pooled-SD units across the 24 subject–timepoint observations. Exploratory (n=4); interpret with the Bayesian credible intervals in figure D.

Reproducibility

All panels regenerate from publicacion/_v3_master_table.csv and the metrics JSONs via python notebooks/08_extended_analysis.py — no raw download or MCMC required. Paper & DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.21015202.

HRP Artemis II · open release (MIT) · María Jesús Puerta Ángulo · Inspiration4 used as a public analogue (not Artemis II flight data).
